creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Created attachment 231267
0001-net-p2p-bazarr-devel-Update-to-1.0.3-beta.16.patch

poudriere ok
runtest ok

Runs in production here (13.0-amd64)

This update is a welcome one for people using the embeddedsubtitle plugin and a big library or big files without embedded subtitles. Thi provider will now cache it's results so it will not re-read the files when trying to upgrade subtitles.
